summary: Comprehensive backend+frontend testing of NIUVA app. 31/31 backend pytest tests pass (100%) covering auth, materials CRUD, full order lifecycle (create → estimate → payment proof → verify → complete), file upload validation (extension + 50MB), file download access control (owner/admin/unauthenticated), notifications (mocked email logged in-app), internship/contact public submissions, portfolio CRUD, settings, users list, admin stats. Frontend Playwright e2e flow verified: home loads with bilingual toggle, portfolio renders 3 seeded items, client register → /dashboard, /order wizard 4 steps (STL upload → material → notes → submit) → /orders/:id with status stepper + SLA banner '...within 24 hours' + file download link + status history, admin login → /admin with all 7 tabs functional, unauthenticated /order redirected to /login. Mocked Resend email confirmed working as designed (notifications collection populated; not flagged as bug).

issues: Page <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'NIUVA' — should be branded in /app/frontend/public/index.html

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'NIUVA — PT Niuva Inovasi Utama' for branding.

OPTIONAL: Spec referenced data-testid 'admin-tab-inquiries' but implementation uses 'admin-tab-contacts' (matches the 'Inquiry' label visually). Either rename testid to 'admin-tab-inquiries' for spec consistency, or update spec. Tab functions correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 688 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, orders, admin, public) for maintainability once feature set grows.
Rate limiter `_rate_buckets` is in-memory; will not work across multiple backend instances. Acceptable for MVP single-instance but flag for production scale.
File download endpoint accepts token via ?auth= query param — required for <a href> downloads but ensure logs/proxies don't capture tokens. Consider rotating short-lived signed URLs in future.

Order number generation uses count_documents — under high concurrency two orders could collide on the same number. Consider using a counter doc with $inc, or accept (number is display only; id is uuid).
All endpoints exclude `_id` correctly via projection — good. Pydantic validation on inputs — good. JWT with 7d expiry — reasonable.
CORS uses '*' from env default; should be tightened to actual frontend origin in production.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@niuva.com / NiuvaAdmin2026 (works). Test clients are dynamically created via /register with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users, materials, portfolio entries, internship/contact submissions. Materials/portfolio created in tests are deleted; users/internships/contacts remain (no DELETE endpoints for cleanup, by design).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` and uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. It covers full order lifecycle + access control + file download. For UI re-tests use data-testids: login-email/password/submit, register-name/email/password/submit, new-order-btn, file-input, material-<Name>, order-next, order-submit, admin-tab-{overview|orders|materials|portfolio|internships|contacts|users|settings}, manage-order-<orderNumber>, estimate-amount, submit-estimate, verify-payment, mark-process, mark-complete, upload-proof-btn, language-toggle. Note: tab for inquiries uses 'admin-tab-contacts' not 'admin-tab-inquiries'.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. App is production-quality for MVP scope. All happy-path and key negative paths verified.
